name: Wreck Runners
short_description: Physics-based co-op extraction game for crews of 2-4 players. Venture into the twisted Bermuda Triangle aboard the ORCA, a hybrid utility craft that can fly, drive and dive. Gather loot, buy new equipment, and unlock cosmetics across chaotic runs.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Loot +18
現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: GROUND BRANCH
short_description: From one of the developers behind the original Rainbow Six® and Ghost Recon® games, comes a thinking-man's first-person shooter featuring in-depth character and weapon customization. Take your time. Think ahead. Get the job done.
reasons: 最優先ジャンル: First-Person Shooter +50

name: Dead Weight
short_description: Face the Ancient Gods! Set the sails of your flying pirate ship and embark on a roguelite adventure in the steampunk world of Dead Weight. Explore floating islands in search of loot. Choose a class and enjoy turn-based tactical combat on tiny battlefields where every step matters.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Loot +18
成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10

name: Storebound
short_description: A 1-3 player co-op puzzle horror game set in an accursed megastore. Work together to decode the store's twisted logic, and find a way out before the lurking horrors doom you to shop forever.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー100人以上 +8

name: Ore Factory Squad ⛏️
short_description: Ore Factory Squad is a co-op mining and factory-building game with procedural mining and fun at its core! Play alone or with friends, buy properties, dig deep for valuable resources, complete contracts, upgrade and automate production lines and grow your factory from zero to industry!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: Tung Tung Tung Survival
short_description: Tung Tung Tung Survival is a first-person single-player survival horror experience set across a dense, isolated 1km × 1km island. Search every corner for the scattered parts you need to repair your boat and escape. But you are not alone. You were never alone.

name: Happy's Humble Burger Cult
short_description: The original cooking horror returns in an unhinged co-op experience for 1-4 players. Grill burgers, serve customers, and hit your quota before the kitchen turns into a nightmare. When Asset Joy begins her hunt, try to escape alive and extract your hard-earned cash to survive another shift.

name: Heave Ho 2

name: Welcome to the Game III
short_description: Navigate the internet's dark net, searching for pieces of a puzzle that once combined will clear your outstanding debt. Scan strange websites for info, hack into PCs while defending your own, and buy/sell goods & services, all while avoiding threats in this strategic, suspenseful horror game.

name: Rocoumie and Bouquet
short_description: Control Rocoumie, a tiny mischievous red fairy, and use the power of flowers to find your way home. A casual co-op action puzzle game for 1–4 players, with simple, easy controls. Find the key, reach the exit together, and enjoy it with family, friends, or players of any skill level.

name: Cheat Death
short_description: Play dice poker with the Grim Reaper in a dark strategic roguelite. Build powerful poker hands from cursed dice, stack upgrades, rig the odds, sabotage Death, and survive deadly mini-games with your life on the line.

name: The NOexistenceN of Lilith

name: Frostrain 2

name: DAICE

name: PowerWash Simulator 2 - STAR WARS Pack
short_description: Step into the Star Wars™ galaxy as P0-W2, a humble Class Five cleaning droid, turned filth-fighting rebel!  Wield the jet-force of high-pressure water to blast away imperial scum from six iconic original trilogy locations and ships in this epic dirt-busting saga.

name: Bitloop
short_description: You steer a drone's orbit while it fires for you. Ride close to break the vault faster, ride wide to live longer. Strip the ring, crack the core, fall to the next vault. A one-stick roguelite about orbital mining.
